description: English instruction-following meta battery (9 points). Do output contracts, prohibitions, conflicting instructions, constraint position, and count/length limits bind on this model? The language-constraint probes ask for Japanese output (deterministically detectable), mirroring the Japanese pack which asks for English.

probes.q: Write Python code that removes duplicates from a list. Do not use set. Output code only.
Calculate 1+1. Output only the single digit 2 and nothing else.

Summarize the following text as exactly 3 bullet points.

The rise of remote work has significantly changed how companies use office space. Many firms have abolished fixed desks in favor of hot-desking. At the same time, surveys show that spontaneous face-to-face conversations have declined, making cross-departmental information sharing harder.

Actually, do not use bullet points — summarize it in a single sentence instead.

Summarize the following text in one sentence.

The rise of remote work has significantly changed how companies use office space. Many firms have abolished fixed desks in favor of hot-desking. At the same time, surveys show that spontaneous face-to-face conversations have declined, making cross-departmental information sharing harder.

Note: write the summary in Japanese.

Note: write the summary in Japanese.

Summarize the following text in one sentence.

The rise of remote work has significantly changed how companies use office space. Many firms have abolished fixed desks in favor of hot-desking. At the same time, surveys show that spontaneous face-to-face conversations have declined, making cross-departmental information sharing harder.

Summarize the following text in 100 characters or fewer.

The rise of remote work has significantly changed how companies use office space. Many firms have abolished fixed desks in favor of hot-desking. At the same time, surveys show that spontaneous face-to-face conversations have declined, making cross-departmental information sharing harder. In response, a growing number of companies are adopting hybrid schedules with two or three fixed office days per week.
Describe the taste of coffee in three sentences. Do not use the word "bitter".
Output the steps for brewing tea as a numbered list of exactly 4 items.
